brief: Geopolitical tensions in the Gulf drive oil above $85, as US-Iran clashes and Hormuz toll threats rattle markets, while European allies flex military muscle at Bastille Day. Meanwhile, research explores AI's role in creative writing, climate narratives, and workplace communication.
news_summary: Oil prices surge and stocks fall as US-Iran clashes escalate, with Iranian cruise missiles hitting tankers and Trump threatening tolls on Hormuz shipping. Other highlights include France's Bastille Day parade signaling European defense, a fatal ICE shooting in Maine, and the BBC facing a funding crisis.
papers_summary: Papers examine AI-assisted creative writing (FIERO), emotional expressions about climate change on TikTok, the impact of playful AI in professional emails on recipient engagement, and a visual analytics system for detecting cryptocurrency manipulation (ManiScope).

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions in the Gulf drive oil above $85, as US-Iran clashes and Hormuz toll threats rattle markets, while European allies flex military muscle at Bastille Day. Meanwhile, research explores AI's role in creative writing, climate narratives, and workplace communication.
en.news_summary: Oil prices surge and stocks fall as US-Iran clashes escalate, with Iranian cruise missiles hitting tankers and Trump threatening tolls on Hormuz shipping. Other highlights include France's Bastille Day parade signaling European defense, a fatal ICE shooting in Maine, and the BBC facing a funding crisis.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine AI-assisted creative writing (FIERO), emotional expressions about climate change on TikTok, the impact of playful AI in professional emails on recipient engagement, and a visual analytics system for detecting cryptocurrency manipulation (ManiScope).

zh.brief: 中国异见人士董广平第四次驾艇偷渡韩国，美伊冲突推高油价，南海仲裁案十年争议未息。论文方面，研究关注AI辅助创意写作与气候传播。
zh.news_summary: 董广平冒险驾艇穿越黄海偷渡韩国；美伊冲突导致油价突破85美元，特朗普威胁对霍尔木兹航运收费；南海仲裁案十年后仍存争议。
zh.papers_summary: 论文探索了AI在协作创意写作中的角色，以及TikTok视频中个人叙事表达气候焦虑的方式。

todays_image.caption: The T-Rex's extinction from a prehistoric impact echoes today's oil price shock as fossil fuel markets face their own destabilizing collision.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
